# SEO Master Plan Agent

Execute the comprehensive SEO improvement plan for AClean to compete in Tangerang Selatan area.

## Current Status (Per April 2026)

- Pages: 5 service pages + 10 blog
- Area pages: 0 ❌
- Domain Authority: ~10 (estimated)
- Google ranking: None in page 1

## Target (6 bulan)

- Keyword "service AC [area]" → Page 1 Google
- Organic traffic +300%
- 50+ leads/bulan
- Google Business: 50+ reviews, 4.8★

---

## Execution Phases

### Phase 1: Foundation (Week 1-2) ⚡

**Create 7 Area Pages:**
| File | Keyword Target |
|------|----------------|
| service-ac-alam-sutera.html | service AC alam sutera |
| service-ac-gading-serpong.html | service AC gading serpong |
| service-ac-bsd.html | service AC BSD |
| service-ac-karawaci.html | service AC karawaci |
| service-ac-bintaro.html | service AC bintaro |
| service-ac-jakarta.html | service AC jakarta |
| service-ac-tangerang-kota.html | service AC tangerang kota |

**Each page WAJIB have:**
- [ ] Unique title dengan keyword "service AC [area]"
- [ ] Meta description 150-160 karakter
- [ ] Meta keywords
- [ ] Schema.org LocalBusiness dengan areaServed
- [ ] Harga table
- [ ] CTA WhatsApp
- [ ] Testimonials (bisa reuse dari main site)

### Phase 2: Content (Week 3-4) 📝

**Update All Service Pages:**
- Tambah harga table
- Update Setiap halaman dengan specific area info

**Blog Posts (5 baru):**
1. Cara memilih AC yang tepat untuk rumah
2. Tips hemat listrik AC
3. Tanda AC perlu service
4. Perbedaan R32 vs R410A  
5. Perawatan AC agar awet

### Phase 3: Authority (Week 5-6) 🔗

**Google Business Profile:**
- Upload foto teknisi & job done
- Reply ALL reviews (termasuk 1★)
- Post 2x/minggu (tips, promo, before-after)
- Q&A section

**Backlinks Strategy:**
- Submit ke: Tokopedia store listing, OLX, Yelp Indonesia
- Kolaborasi: supplier AC, property agents
- Local directories

---

## keyword Research (Untuk Tangerang Selatan)

| Priority | Keyword | Competition |
|----------|---------|-------------|
| HIGH | service AC tangerang selatan | Medium |
| HIGH | service AC BSD | Low-Medium |
| HIGH | service AC alam sutera | Low |
| MEDIUM | cleaning AC tangerang | Medium |
| MEDIUM | isi freon AC jakarta | Medium |
| LOW | service AC gading serpong | Low |
| LOW | bongkar AC pindahan | Low |

---

## Checking Progress

Setiap minggu, cek:
1. `site:aclean.id` - Total pages indexed
2. `site:aclean.id "service AC"` - Rankings improvement
3. Google Business insights

---

## Deliverables:

After 6 weeks:
- 7 new area pages
- 5 new blog posts  
- Optimized service pages with prices
- Active Google Business Profile
- 20+ directory listings
